---
name: Component Submission
about: Propose or submit a new UI component to UI-Verse
title: "[COMPONENT]: "
labels: "enhancement, component"
assignees: ""
---

## Component Details
- **Component Name**: (e.g., Glassmorphic Pricing Card)
- **Category**: (e.g., Cards, Buttons, Navbars, Loaders, Forms)
- **Tech Stack**: (Confirming Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS or TypeScript Web Component)

## Design and Aesthetics
- **Harmonious Palette**: (Describe the color scheme/contrast tokens used)
- **Transitions/Animations**: (Specify any hover transitions, keyframes, or micro-animations)
- **Responsive Layout**: (How does it adapt to mobile/tablet viewports?)

## Accessibility (A11y) Considerations
- **Semantic HTML**: (e.g., `<button>` instead of `<div>`, `<header>`, aria landmarks)
- **Keyboard Navigation**: (Confirming focus visible ring behaves properly)
- **Aria Labels**: (List any necessary `aria-` labels or descriptions)

## Code Quality Check
- [ ] Statically validated styling with `npm run lint:css`
- [ ] Statically validated markup with `npm run lint:html`
- [ ] Added/updated metadata version json file
- [ ] No inline styling or Tailwind dependencies (pure Vanilla CSS)

## Screenshots / Interactive Preview
(Attach screenshots, GIFs, or link to active sandbox if available)
